arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford told how to resolve Man Utd feud with Ruben Amorim - 'Not that difficult'
arts.sum: Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford remains at Old Trafford despite declaring his desire to depart the club more than a month ago - and has not featured under Ruben Amorim since

arts.ttl: FCSB 0-2 Man Utd: Match report & 4 talking points as Mainoo & Garnacho underline importance
arts.sum: Analysing four key talking points as Man Utd complete Europa League 'leaue phase' for win over FCSB.

arts.ttl: FCSB 0-2 Manchester United: Ruben Amorim gets his wish as Red Devils qualify for Europa League last 16
arts.sum: The Red Devils seal a top eight finish after a big win in Romania

arts.ttl: Who Manchester United could play in Europa League last 16 as route to final revealed
arts.sum: Man Utd won 2-1 against FCSB in the Europa League on Thursday, ensuring progression to the competition's Round of 16.

arts.ttl: Kobbie Mainoo shines as Man Utd beat FCSB to seal Europa League last-16 spot
arts.sum: Diogo Dalot and Mainoo scored second-half goals for United in Bucharest.

arts.ttl: Europa League play-offs and knockout bracket as Man Utd and Tottenham learn fate
arts.sum: Manchester United, Tottenham and Rangers have all qualified for the Last 16 of the new-look Europa League after winning their final league matches on Thursday night

arts.ttl: Man Utd discover four potential Europa League last-16 opponents after FCSB win
arts.sum: FCSB 0-2 MAN UTD: Manchester United will face Real Sociedad, Galatasaray, Midtjylland or AZ Alkmaar in the Europa League last 16 winning in Bucharest thanks to goals from Diogo Dalot and Kobbie Mainoo

arts.ttl: FCSB 0-2 Man Utd: Player rating as Red Devils conclude league phase with confident win
arts.sum: Player ratings from the Europa League matchday eight clash between FCSB and Man Utd.

arts.ttl: FCSB 0-2 Man United: Highlights, man of the match, stats on an excellent night for Red Devils head coach Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United secure their spot in the last-16 stage of the Europa League courtesy of a 2-0 victory over FCSB in their final match in the league phase of the competition.

arts.ttl: Kobbie Mainoo shines as Man Utd beat FCSB to seal Europa League last-16 spot
arts.sum: Diogo Dalot and Mainoo scored second-half goals for United in Bucharest.
